rulings.Case Title: JILMA COREA VS. SONIA COREA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulated Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 28, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF JILMA COREA Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulated Judgment Hearing Required. Parties to present to the Court at the hearing: (1) Grant Deed executed within 10 court days of November 16, 2015; (2) Will executed within10 court days of November 16, 2015 ; (3) Special Needs Trust documents executed within 90 court days of November 16, 2015; (4) check for $20,000. =(501/REQ)
